'''dasungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanfem|meanfem]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanfem|meanfem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dasungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsingith|dæsingith]] || [[word:dæsingij|dæsingij]] || [[word:dæsingish|dæsingish]] || [[word:dæsingi|dæsingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasusunguth|dasusunguth]] || [[word:dasusunguj|dasusunguj]] || [[word:dasusungush|dasusungush]] || [[word:dasusungu|dasusungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasunguth|dasunguth]] || [[word:dasunguj|dasunguj]] || [[word:dasungush|dasungush]] || [[word:dasungu|dasungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasufnguth|dasufnguth]] || [[word:dasufnguj|dasufnguj]] || [[word:dasufngush|dasufngush]] || [[word:dasufnguf|dasufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasunguthu|dasunguthu]] || [[word:dasunguju|dasunguju]] || [[word:dasungushu|dasungushu]] || [[word:dasunguku|dasunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasunguth|dasunguth]] || [[word:dasunguj|dasunguj]] || [[word:dasungush|dasungush]] || [[word:dasungu|dasungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasunguthul|dasunguthul]] || [[word:dasungujul|dasungujul]] || [[word:dasungushul|dasungushul]] || [[word:dasungukul|dasungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasunguthuthu|dasunguthuthu]] || [[word:dasungujuju|dasungujuju]] || [[word:dasungushushu|dasungushushu]] || [[word:dasunguku|dasunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasunguthun|dasunguthun]] || [[word:dasungujun|dasungujun]] || [[word:dasungushun|dasungushun]] || [[word:dasungukun|dasungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasunguthuoro|dasunguthuoro]] || [[word:dasungujuoro|dasungujuoro]] || [[word:dasungushuoro|dasungushuoro]] || [[word:dasungukuoro|dasungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
